one_time_description: Impairment write-down of capital assets (vehicles & equipment)
economic_notes: Glooscap Corner operates convenience store, gaming facility and gas bar. Commercial fisheries operates three lobster fishing boats. GBEs include Economic Development Corp, Landing #1 and #2 (fuel/convenience), Glooscap Energy (renewable energy), Yarmouth Bar Fisheries (seafood processor, 52% owned), Seakist Lobster (lobster pound). Feta cheese operation (Glooscap Ilia Gourmet Foods LP) ceased during the year. COVID-19 impacted gaming and commercial operations near year-end.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Auditor firm name not extractable from provided text. Prior period adjustment made: investment in GBEs and accumulated surplus restated for Landing #1 grant treatment error (decrease of $5,980,100 in GBE investment, decrease of $6,102,593 in opening accumulated surplus). Six GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis with combined net loss of $690,323. Feta cheese subsidiary (Glooscap Ilia Gourmet Foods LP) consolidated and ceased operations during year — $2,336,218 in expenses. ACOA loan of $907,074 matured January 2020 but not repaid at year-end, included in 2021 principal repayments. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event impacting gaming and commercial operations. Pension plan contingent liability identified post year-end for omitted employees and remittance deficiencies. Expenses by object total ($11,124,700) differs from statement of operations total ($11,063,125) due to GBE loss treatment. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text.
